{{Infobox location
| name = Magic Tower
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

''See also: [[Magic Tower Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Magic Tower is a prominent institution of the [[Galactic Union]] and serves as the central hub for the union's magical community. Located on an artificial moon, the structure is a massive [[steel]] spire that extends through the clouds and functions as a vertical city comparable to a full colony. While it is widely recognized throughout the galaxy as an educational facility, only a small portion of its space is dedicated to schooling. The Tower is responsible for training students who go on to become certified wizards, and it has produced hundreds of millions of mages. The facility features various docking areas for personal craft and shuttles, including a specific dock for teachers. Although it is an influential part of magical culture, it is not considered a primary military objective for groups like the [[Legion]]. The Tower's leadership has historically included an enigmatic [[First Director]] who held significant connections across galactic magical society.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Magic Tower is a polished [[steel]] spire that pierces the clouds, functioning as both a school and a vertical city. This location features manicured lawns, a teacher's dock, and serves as a port where Sunsail ships can be picked up. While its reputation provides protection for students, the tower also maintains significant political reach within the [[Galactic Union]] and restricts corporations from operating within its system without special exemptions. Ultimately, the tower's influence is highlighted when [[Varic Vallenar]] requests its assistance in the fight against the [[Iron Legion]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Magic Tower]] is a vertical city and a school.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Magic Tower]] is a polished [[steel]] spire that pierces the clouds.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator is bound to the [[Magic Tower]] on something like parole.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Magic Tower]] has a teacher's dock.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Magic Tower]] has a reputation that can protect students.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Magic Tower]] has manicured lawns.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23">''The Captain'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Corporations are not permitted to operate within a system of the [[Magic Tower]] without special exemption.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c24">''The Captain'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Magic Tower]] is a location where ships can be picked up.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c25">''The Captain'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Magic Tower]] is a location with Sunsail ships.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Magic Tower]] is a location that has political reach within the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c36">''The Captain'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Varic Vallenar]] requested the help of the [[Magic Tower]] against the [[Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c37">''The Captain'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Magic Tower]] assumes wizards can achieve significant results in both water elementalism and [[binding]] magic.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Magic Tower]] is a location where [[Omega]] attacked [[Varic Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator has students from the [[Magic Tower]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Magic Tower]] has students who are growing impatient.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Magic Tower]] is an organization or location from which [[Mariala Brechess]] originates.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c24">''The Knight'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|As an institution of the [[Galactic Union]], the Magic Tower is governed by an enigmatic [[Archmage]] serving as the [[First Director]]. Following a recent visit to [[Dornoth]] Four by the [[First Director]], the organization has maintained its commitment to providing full support to [[Planetary Security]]. Currently, the tower is working against the [[Captain]] while managing internal administrative duties such as providing class lists. These operations are conducted in accordance with established policies regarding student information.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Magic Tower]] is led by a [[First Director]] who is an enigmatic [[Archmage]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Magic Tower]] has a [[First Director]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Magic Tower]] is an institution of the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Magic Tower]]'s [[First Director]] visited [[Dornoth]] Four last week.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Magic Tower]] has provided full support to [[Planetary Security]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Magic Tower]] is working against the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Magic Tower]] provides class lists.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Magic Tower]] has policies regarding student information.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Melerius and the Magic Tower students were growing impatient."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“The Magic Tower is working against me,” he said darkly.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“You requested my class list from the Magic Tower,” I said.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
